description:
Overview:

Stop Unwanted Behavior with a Simple Push of a Button!

Humane & Safe: Using 25KHz ultrasonic sound, this device safely deters dogs, cats, and even rats from unwanted behaviors. The sound is undetectable to humans, making it the perfect solution for peaceful behavior correction without harm.

Quick & Effective: Point, press, and watch the magic happen. Most dogs respond immediately to the gentle sound, stopping barking, aggression, and unwanted behavior.

Works Best for Adult Dogs: Ideal for dogs over 6 months, especially larger breeds. Not recommended for puppies under 6 months or senior dogs over 8 years old due to their less sensitive hearing.

50 ft Range: Effective up to 50 feet, but for optimal results, use it within 18 feet. Ensure clear line of sight for maximum impact.

Long-lasting Battery: Built to last, the device offers dependable performance for ongoing training sessions.

Key Features:

  • Safe, Non-invasive: Gentle ultrasonic sound is safe for your pet and the environment.

  • Easy to Use: Simply point and press to stop barking or aggressive behavior instantly.

  • Portable & Compact: Lightweight, perfect for walks, training, and keeping your pet in check.

  • Multiple Uses: Effective for dogs, cats, and even small animals like rats.


Product information:
Color: Orange
Material: ABS
Sound wave: 25000 to 40000Hz
Charging mode: Type-C charging
Battery: 3.7V 800mAh
Size: 110*30mm


Packing list:
Dog repellent + data cable + manual
